place: Plai Laem / Choeng Mon Hills, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Five-Bedroom Villa with 180° Sea Views & Infinity Pool, Choeng Mon
blurb: A contemporary five-bedroom villa perched in the Plai Laem and Choeng Mon hills, framing a 180-degree sweep of the gulf from every principal room. An 18-metre infinity pool, a twelve-seat cinema and an indoor spa sit within roughly 700 m² of furnished, move-in-ready living, on a freehold Chanote plot of some 3,477 m² — ten minutes from Fisherman's Village and the airport.
detail:
Set high in the Plai Laem and Choeng Mon hills on Koh Samui's north-east cape, this five-bedroom villa opens to an uninterrupted 180-degree panorama of the sea and the islands beyond, on a freehold Chanote-title plot of some 3,477 m². The architecture pairs a restrained, contemporary frame with traditional Thai detailing — an antique timber entrance gate, deep eaves and natural stone — for a home that feels both current and rooted in the island.

Sliding glass walls dissolve the line between the main living room and the pool deck, where an 18-metre infinity edge appears to spill toward the horizon above a generous sun terrace. The open living and dining spaces flow to a full kitchen, with a separate outdoor barbecue kitchen for entertaining as the sun goes down.

Each of the five en-suite bedrooms is wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass with direct access to a terrace or the garden, and bathrooms finished with terrazzo tubs and contemporary fixtures. Four sit on the main floor, while a fifth beside the pool offers added privacy for guests; a loft-style lounge with a sofa bed and a dedicated study round out the accommodation.

Wellness and leisure are built in, with an indoor spa and massage room and a twelve-seat private cinema. Offered fully furnished and move-in ready, the villa lies around ten minutes from Fisherman's Village, the beaches and dining of Choeng Mon and Chaweng, and Samui International Airport.
